perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white top stands in a Costco warehouse in front of a large display of 'Lotte Dream Cake' boxes. She gestures excitedly towards the product. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting where the same woman is seated behind two boxes of the cake, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. (3) Close-up shots show a chocolate pie sliced in half to reveal its layers and cream filling. The woman's hands hold the plate and interact with the food. (4) The camera returns to the woman at home as she continues her review, showing facial expressions of enjoyment while talking.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and high-tempo background music plays immediately. A female voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched tone in Mandarin. (2) The soundscape remains consistent with continuous speaking and steady BGM, though the acoustic environment shifts from a slightly echoey warehouse to a clearer, studio-like indoor recording. (3) Occasional 'ding' or chime sound effects are heard during the presentation of price and key features. (4) The audio concludes with the woman's voice maintaining high energy until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top. '韓國爆紅 樂天夢幻派' (Korea's viral hit: Lotte Dream Pie) in large stylized font. (2) Functional Text: '429元', '36顆', '12元/顆' providing price and quantity information. (3) Decorative Text: '香氣十足' (Aromatic), '入口即化' (Melts in your mouth), '份量滿滿' (Full portion) with checkmark icons. (4) Content Text: '大人味巧克力派' (Adult-flavor chocolate pie) and '甜度：7分' (Sweetness: 7/10) summarizing the review.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook in-store -> Detailed home review -> Food close-ups -> Final rating

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator present throughout the video
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white off-shoulder top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First part features Costco warehouse aisles with pallets of snacks; second part features a modern home interior with a sofa and grey countertop.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Value Analysis -> Sensory Demo -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a highly energetic and positive review of Lotte Dream Cakes purchased at Costco. The video aims to convince viewers of the product's quality, taste, and cost-effectiveness by showing both the retail context and the actual product consumption.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator actively promotes the product, highlights the price at a specific retailer, and provides a numerical rating.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Specific bucket hat accessory and fast-paced high-energy narration.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical short-form food influencer content designed for high engagement through visual cues and rapid editing.
